channel.title: Twitter - @elonmusk
channel.description: 自动生成的Twitter RSS - 最后更新: 2026-04-10 23:01 UTC | 来源实例: https://xcancel.com

item.title: @elonmusk: NEWS: The Tesla Model Y was the top-selling passenger vehicle in China in March 2026, with 39,827 re...
item.description: NEWS: The Tesla Model Y was the top-selling passenger vehicle in China in March 2026, with 39,827 retail registrations, beating all EVs and ICE models. It outpaced competitors across sedans, SUVs, and MPVs. It was also the only premium-priced model in the top ten, standing out in a list dominated by lower-cost domestic EVs and affordable internal combustion vehicles. The Model Y is priced between approximately 263,500 and 313,500 yuan, significantly higher than most competing vehicles in the ranking. Several top-selling models, such as the Geely Galaxy Xingyuan and the BYD Yuan UP, fall below the 100,000 yuan mark.evwire.com/p/china-tesla-mod…

item.title: @elonmusk: “I spent 1 year with a Tesla and realized one thing: I was 100% confident in my misinformed opinions...
item.description: “I spent 1 year with a Tesla and realized one thing: I was 100% confident in my misinformed opinions. I used to be an EV skeptic. I was wrong. Here are the 5 things that changed my mind: Charging - I thought gas stations were better. I was wrong. Waking up every morning to a “full tank” is the single best benefit of ownership. No more stops in the rain or snow. It’s a total game-changer. One-Pedal Driving - I didn't think braking could be improved. Wrong again. Regenerative braking is so intuitive that I almost never touch the physical brake pedal. Going back to a two-pedal internal combustion engine feels clunky now. Full Self-Driving (FSD) - I said I’d never let a computer drive for me. Now? I’m convinced it drives better than I do. The improvements this year have been mind-blowing. This tech is going to provide massive mobility for the elderly and disabled. The Screen vs. Buttons - I used to tell friends, "I like knobs and buttons." I laugh at that now. Thinking I need physical buttons is like missing the BlackBerry keyboard. The touch interface is intuitive, clean, and constantly improving. Performance - I knew it would be fast, but it’s absurd. It replaced a high-end German sports car, and the Tesla handles and accelerates significantly better while still being a practical family vehicle. Ignorance was bliss because it made me feel smart, but day-to-day ownership of the Model Y proved me wrong. If you're on the fence, the experience is likely much different from what you imagine.”

item.title: @elonmusk: This monster was magically competent to stand trial the first 14 times but suddenly this time he isn...
item.description: This monster was magically competent to stand trial the first 14 times but suddenly this time he isn’t competent when he’s facing the death penalty ABSOLUTELY INFURIATING We shouldn’t have to live like this

item.title: @elonmusk: Early next week, the Senate will resume debate on the SAVE America Act. We need to stay in it until ...
item.description: Early next week, the Senate will resume debate on the SAVE America Act. We need to stay in it until it’s passed. Spread the word if you agree.

item.title: @elonmusk: Did you know C.S. Lewis predicted the modern obsession with “being nice” would destroy the soul? In ...
item.description: Did you know C.S. Lewis predicted the modern obsession with “being nice” would destroy the soul? In The Abolition of Man, Lewis argues that when a society stops believing in objective virtue, it doesn’t become tolerant… it becomes manipulable. He calls the result “men without chests.” People with appetites and intellects, but no courage, no honor, no trained moral instincts. They can calculate everything and defend nothing. Lewis saw that once we reject inherited moral law, we don’t become free. We become raw material… easily shaped by propaganda, pleasure, and fear. Modern man prides himself on compassion while quietly surrendering every standard that once gave compassion meaning. Lewis’s insight is brutal: a civilization that educates clever cowards will eventually be ruled by tyrants or technicians. Because when nothing is worth dying for, everything becomes negotiable… including human dignity.

item.title: @elonmusk: Wake up—it's Artemis II's last day in space! As the crew prepares to splash down in the Pacific Ocea...
item.description: Wake up—it's Artemis II's last day in space! As the crew prepares to splash down in the Pacific Ocean this evening, they started their day with "Run To The Water" by Live, their wake-up song played by Mission Control.

item.title: @elonmusk: Neuralink enables those who have lost the ability to speak to speak again
item.description: Neuralink enables those who have lost the ability to speak to speak again

item.title: @elonmusk: Starlink provides an Internet connection in flight that is on par with ground Internet speed & laten...
item.description: Starlink provides an Internet connection in flight that is on par with ground Internet speed & latency

item.title: @elonmusk: Fist bump! 👊 The Artemis II crew is now under 35,000 miles from Earth. The astronauts are preparing ...
item.description: Fist bump! 👊 The Artemis II crew is now under 35,000 miles from Earth. The astronauts are preparing the spacecraft for reentry and the weather is looking good for splashdown.

item.title: @elonmusk: First (supervised) FSD approval in Europe! Congratulations to the Tesla team and thank you to the re...
item.description: First (supervised) FSD approval in Europe! Congratulations to the Tesla team and thank you to the regulatory authorities in the Netherlands for all the hard work required to make this happen.

item.title: @elonmusk: FSD Supervised approved in the Netherlands 🇳🇱
item.description: FSD Supervised approved in the Netherlands 🇳🇱

item.title: @elonmusk: RDW was extremely rigorous in their review
item.description: RDW was extremely rigorous in their review

item.title: @elonmusk: SpaceXAI Colossus 2 now has 7 models in training: - Imagine V2 - 2 variants of 1T - 2 variants of 1....
item.description: SpaceXAI Colossus 2 now has 7 models in training: - Imagine V2 - 2 variants of 1T - 2 variants of 1.5T - 6T - 10T Some catching up to do.
